title: Fomek Reforged
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2612a5d3149663e2571323b0195af815960474f8.png)
# ⚠️ Note: Kleiders Custom Renderer API required.

_Fomek Reforged is the core mod for the Fomek mod series, introducing a structured multiverse system, an advanced power system, and machines that use energy. It serves as the foundation for future expansions, adding essential mechanics that enhance gameplay depth and progression._

## 🌌 Multiverse System

Every Minecraft world is a branch in the multiverse. Travel between dimensions using rifts or commands, with entities also capable of crossing worlds. The multiversal system connects all worlds, unlocking new exploration possibilities.

## ⚡ Superpower System

Unlock and control multiple abilities at once. The Extended Inventory displays active powers, allowing easy switching and customization. Combine, enhance, and master powers to shape your gameplay.

## 🎯 Training System

Abilities improve naturally through gameplay. For example, taking fire damage strengthens fire resistance. Skills evolve dynamically, rewarding interaction with the environment.

## 🏭 Machines & Technology

The mod adds energy-powered machines, including generators, smelters, and automation tools. Craft key components like capacitors, circuits, and electric motors to build advanced machinery and optimize resource processing.

## 🖥 Multiversal Device & Extended Inventory

The Multiversal Device features a modern OS-style interface, with some machines connecting to it via the "Link" app for expanded functionality. The Extended Inventory adds extra slots for new items and abilities, allowing you to manage your multiversal adventure more efficiently.

Fomek Reforged lays the groundwork for a deep, interconnected mod ecosystem, bringing structured multiversal mechanics, powerful abilities, and energy-driven machines into Minecraft.

## ⌨️ Commands
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

/multiverse travel [earth-id] - Transports you to the multiverse associated with the specified earth-id.
/multiverse - Shows a list of all created multiverses.

/superpower list - Shows a list of all curently loaded superpowers.
/superpower [player] [add/remove/list] - Manage player's superpowers.

</details>
